spotlight.title: A Legacy of Courage
spotlight.description: A gathering in remembrance of the martyrdom and celebrating the legacy of Sayyiduna Ameer Hamzah (RA). Featuring Shaykh Asrar Rashid. Also includes Eithaal & Thawaab gathering for the late beloved wife of Haji Mohammed Ramzan.
spotlight.location: Ghousia Masjid, 56 Camrose St, London, SE2 0JA

notificationBar.linkText: A Legacy of Courage — Sunday 12th April, 5:30 PM
